creator: upiter77@lycos.com
text:
I've freeBSD 7.2 and kde-lite-3.5.10_2
When I try to logoff, KDE is crashind each time and Backtrace shows these message:

[New Thread 0x29801040 (LWP 100093)]
[Switching to Thread 0x29801040 (LWP 100093)]
[KCrash handler]
#6  0x29395d9b in jpeg_CreateDecompress () from /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.so.10

How-To-Repeat: install kde-lite-3.5.10_2
